generated_assessment.reasoning: This person's extremely low Agreeableness (especially Trust at 0th percentile) and very high Neuroticism (Anxiety, Anger/Hostility) strongly predispose them to skepticism and distrust of mainstream institutions, including journalism. Their conventional Openness (23rd percentile) and low Values openness further reinforce a preference for established, non-elite sources, leading to clear opposition to trusting mainstream journalism, though not maximal because their high Conscientiousness and Extraversion may still allow some pragmatic reliance on mainstream outlets for factual information.
